/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcanvas.so -o /home/daniel/projects/testing/deltascope_cpp/libs/canvas/libcanvas.so CMakeFiles/canvas.dir/src/canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/canvas.dir/src/canvasutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/canvas.dir/src/engineDumb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/canvas.dir/src/element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/canvas.dir/src/geometry.cpp.o  -ldrm
